reviews.review_description: It’s just a blue background with a few stars and music. There’s literally nothing to do, nothing to click. Just a blank blue sky with stars that eventually disappear leaving just a blank blue background. I got this a while ago, I hope it was free! No point downloading even if it’s free.
In fact, it enraged me, and now I have to go to court.

Not a bad app, but not great either. Downloading the movies takes a very long time and the app crashed several times before the download was complete, so I had to start all over again. The movies are pretty blurry and this hampers the experience
